scripts.preview: opennextjs-cloudflare build && node scripts/patch-og.mjs && opennextjs-cloudflare preview
scripts.deploy: opennextjs-cloudflare build && node scripts/patch-og.mjs && opennextjs-cloudflare deploy
scripts.deploy:preview: opennextjs-cloudflare build && node scripts/patch-og.mjs && opennextjs-cloudflare deploy --env preview
scripts.deploy:production: opennextjs-cloudflare build && node scripts/patch-og.mjs && opennextjs-cloudflare deploy --env production
scripts.upload: opennextjs-cloudflare build && node scripts/patch-og.mjs && opennextjs-cloudflare upload
